steps.formalization:
PREDICATES:
eagle(x) ::: x is a bald eagle
bear(x) ::: x is a bear
dog(x) ::: x is a dog
rough(x) ::: x is rough
blue(x) ::: x is blue
nice(x) ::: x is nice
chase(x, y) ::: x chases y
need(x, y) ::: x needs y
eat(x, y) ::: x eats y
cold(x) ::: x is cold

PREMISES:
NOT rough(eagle)
NOT need(bear, eagle)
need(dog, bear)
rough(x) -> chase(x, eagle)
need(x, bear) -> NOT blue(x)
nice(bear) -> chase(bear, eagle)
eat(x, eagle) -> rough(x)
cold(x) & chase(x, bear) -> rough(bear)
eat(x, bear) & need(x, bear) -> NOT eat(bear, eagle)
cold(dog) & nice(dog) -> eat(dog, eagle)
need(x, bear) -> eat(x, eagle)

CONCLUSION:
need(dog, bear)

cold(dog) & nice(dog) -> eat(dog, bald_eagle)
need(x, bear) -> eat(x, bald_eagle)

CONCLUSION:
need(bald_eagle, bear)
